basics.name: Shivam Mahajan
basics.label: Computational Physicist
basics.summary: Computational Physicist with 7+ years of experience in developing high-performance computational models and simulations for complex materials. Proficient in Python and C++, with expertise in molecular dynamics and statistical modeling backed by a strong track record in interdisciplinary research and collaboration.

work.name: Nanyang Technological University
work.summary: School of Physical and Mathematical Sciences (SPMS)
highlights: Conduct molecular dynamics simulations to study the structural, mechanical, vibrational, and dynamical evolution of complex amorphous systems.
Write Python and C++ programs for statistical analysis and data processing.
Develop and implement computational models to simulate material behavior at the atomic level and optimize simulation codes to enhance computational efficiency.
Analyze large datasets to extract meaningful insights and patterns related to material properties.
Prepare detailed technical reports and presentations to communicate research findings.

courses: Molecular dynamics simulations of amorphous systems
Correlations in crowded networks and force transmission in materials
Deposition of thin films of organo-metallic compounds
Structural and optical properties using various characterization techniques

volunteer.summary: Guiding student leaders in organization of various events.
Led a team of about fifty people and contributed towards the successful organization of the biggest TED conference in Singapore.
Organized monthly seminars and Nobel Laureate Public Lectures with financial support from the Institute of Advanced Studies.
Organized various social, recreational and academic events.

awards.title: Gold Medal for Best PhD Thesis in Physics
3-Minute Thesis Competition
awards.summary: Department Winner, University 2nd Runner-up, National Participant.

awards.title: Teaching Assistant Certification
awards.awarder: Teaching, Learning, and Pedagogy Department, NTU

awards.title: Lectureship Eligibility — CSIR-NET (All India Rank: 22)
awards.awarder: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research, India
awards.summary: Eligible for Lectureship in Indian Universities.

awards.title: GATE — Top 5% in All India Graduate Aptitude Test in Physics
BSc — Ranked 1st in College, 3rd in University
Summer Research Fellowships at BARC and IISER
awards.summary: Selected twice by Indian Academy of Sciences (2013, 2015).

awards.title: Higher Secondary Board — Ranked 1st in District

publications.name: Revealing the Geometrical and Vibrational Properties of Defects in Amorphous Solids
Heterogeneous attenuation of sound waves in three-dimensional amorphous solids
Quasi-localized vibrational modes, boson peak and sound attenuation in model mass-spring networks
Unifying the vibrational properties in amorphous solids
Emergence of linear isotropic elasticity in amorphous and polycrystalline materials
Designing phononic band gaps with sticky potentials
Reverse Janssen Effect in narrow granular columns

projects.name: Summer Research Fellowship — BARC
projects.description: Studied the interaction of silica nanoparticles with proteins using Small Angle Neutron Scattering (SANS) and Dynamic Light Scattering (DLS). Selected by Indian Academy of Sciences.

projects.description: Project on Basic Laboratory Techniques and Stereoselective Synthesis of Oxindoles. Selected by Indian Academy of Sciences.
